title: How would you react if Asuka really was replaced by Mari entirely from 20 onwards
display_title: How would you react if Asuka really was replaced by Mari entirely from 20 onwards
wikitext:
[]: How would you react if Asuka really was replaced by Mari entirely from 2.0/onwards?             Quote Post by WunderBah » Tue Mar 29, 2016 9:00 pm Consider how the initial drafts from the second movie were written and all...

[]: Re: How would you react if Asuka really was replaced by Mari entirely from 2.0/onwards?             Quote Post by IronEvangelion » Tue Mar 29, 2016 9:08 pm I'd be pretty positive about it, since we would actually get some backstory and development for Mari since she would have a lot more screen time. It would also allow the Rebuild to further differentiate itself from NGE and become more of its own continuity than it already is. But then again, this is coming from someone who wants a new Eva series/continuity with an entirely new cast of characters, so I may be a little biased.

[]: Re: How would you react if Asuka really was replaced by Mari entirely from 2.0/onwards?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Tue Mar 29, 2016 9:16 pm Depends how it was handled. I'll admit I was pretty salty the first few times I watched 2.0 and it seemed like Khara was trying to sweep Asuka under the rug. If Asuka wasn't in the movie at all and Mari was the only pilot for Unit 02, I'd be more okay with that than their original idea of having Asuka hanging around in Mari's shadow but not being good enough to pilot. That's not fair to either character.

[]: Re: How would you react if Asuka really was replaced by Mari entirely from 2.0/onwards?             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 29, 2016 9:22 pm I'm not sure I would've cared that much, to be frank. But Q Asuka is best Asuka, so I'm glad things turned out the way they did.

[]: Re: How would you react if Asuka really was replaced by Mari entirely from 2.0/onwards?             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Mar 29, 2016 9:29 pm Asuka is integral to the Eva franchise, so killing her off so early on in the new series would have been a mistake and I would have raged.

[]: Re: How would you react if Asuka really was replaced by Mari entirely from 2.0/onwards?             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Mar 29, 2016 9:43 pm Depends on how they would have handled it. If the writing was there to support the switch I'd be fully for it. If it was just done for shock value then probably not.

[]: Re: How would you react if Asuka really was replaced by Mari entirely from 2.0/onwards?             Quote Post by BC Baron » Tue Mar 29, 2016 10:45 pm Why not just replace Shinji with Kaworu while you're at it?

[]: Re: How would you react if Asuka really was replaced by Mari entirely from 2.0/onwards?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Mar 30, 2016 12:30 am Sachi wrote: Asuka is integral to the Eva franchise, so killing her off so early on...

[]: Re: How would you react if Asuka really was replaced by Mari entirely from 2.0/onwards?             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Mar 30, 2016 12:39 am Mr. Tines wrote: I took the thesis as being she never shows at all (there's always Touji for use as sacrificial lamb). In any case, it's doll-loving Shikinami who turns up, Asuka's OOC-ness being an early theme in the Ha-hate threads.

[]: Re: How would you react if Asuka really was replaced by Mari entirely from 2.0/onwards?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Mar 30, 2016 12:43 am I read it as taking the "Mari does Asuka's scenes" that the early drafts had to the logical conclusion, rather than having any push-back to reinstate her.

[]: Re: How would you react if Asuka really was replaced by Mari entirely from 2.0/onwards?             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Mar 30, 2016 12:53 am Either way, my answer still stands; just change "killing her off" with "replacing"'. The crux of my point is that Asuka is too vital of a character of the franchise to write off or ignore. I can see them playing around with the possibility if Miyamura never came back to reprise the role though.

[]: Re: How would you react if Asuka really was replaced by Mari entirely from 2.0/onwards?             Quote Post by Shark Knight » Wed Mar 30, 2016 3:22 am If they really killed her off then that would had been suicide for the franchise or at least the rebuilds. I kind of get what they did by placing Asuka in such a danger spot but I would have liked to see her fight rather than Mari. Thing is, it looks like they wanted to put Mari in there but they didnt know how to do so.

[]: Re: How would you react if Asuka really was replaced by Mari entirely from 2.0/onwards?             Quote Post by Stillborn » Wed Mar 30, 2016 3:37 am BC Baron wrote: Why not just replace Shinji with Kaworu while you're at it?

[]: Re: How would you react if Asuka really was replaced by Mari entirely from 2.0/onwards?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Mar 30, 2016 3:46 am How so? The popularity of Kaworu is surely as a counterpart to Shinji.

[]: Re: How would you react if Asuka really was replaced by Mari entirely from 2.0/onwards?             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 30, 2016 3:48 am BC Baron wrote: Why not just replace Shinji with Kaworu while you're at it?

[]: Re: How would you react if Asuka really was replaced by Mari entirely from 2.0/onwards?             Quote Post by Dima » Wed Mar 30, 2016 4:54 am I wouldn't really mind but i would prefer if she was present from the start and not for example take Asuka's place in case she died. So in other words no Asuka at all in Rebuild.

[]: Re: How would you react if Asuka really was replaced by Mari entirely from 2.0/onwards?             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Mar 30, 2016 9:22 am That would mean no more AsuMari, which would make me sad. It would also deny us Q!Asuka, which is one of the NTE's better features.

[]: Re: How would you react if Asuka really was replaced by Mari entirely from 2.0/onwards?             Quote Post by robersora » Wed Mar 30, 2016 10:24 am It would be interesting, if they didn't include Asuka in 2.22 - give all her scenes to Mari, tweak them a little and still have Toji in Unit-03. It would totally work and give 2.22 a completely different impression. Then let Asuka magically appear in Q - with a few tweaked lines her behavior towards Shinji would still make sense. She just would have known Shinji by hearsay and her role in the story would be that of an "outsider" justifyingly buying into the "It's all Shinji's fault" - narrative.

[]: Re: How would you react if Asuka really was replaced by Mari entirely from 2.0/onwards?             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Wed Mar 30, 2016 10:48 am Mari has some good traits that I liked in Asuka Classic, Child Genius, boobies, vicious fighting style, likes the junk food, knows how pathetic Shinji is, likes to sing, etc etc. I'm fine with either one of them.

[]: Re: How would you react if Asuka really was replaced by Mari entirely from 2.0/onwards?             Quote Post by Glor » Wed Mar 30, 2016 11:27 am We should send Anno lots of angry hate mail to make a fifth movie featuring Mari. Better yet, do the same thing with the hate mail, but for a movie that explores the 14 year timeskip.
